# 特殊複雜照護需要問卷回應範例 - 臺灣長期照顧實作指引 (Taiwan Long-Term Care Implementation Guide) v0.4.1

* [**Table of Contents**](toc.md)
* [**Artifacts Summary**](artifacts.md)
* **特殊複雜照護需要問卷回應範例**

## Example QuestionnaireResponse: 特殊複雜照護需要問卷回應範例

Profile: [照顧管理評估量表－特殊複雜照護需要問卷回覆](StructureDefinition-LTCQuestionnaireResponseCMSSpecialCare.md)

* [LinkID](https://hl7.org/fhir/R4/formats.html#table): ltc-questionnaire-response-special-care-example
  * [Text](https://hl7.org/fhir/R4/formats.html#table): 
  * [Definition](https://hl7.org/fhir/R4/formats.html#table): 
  * [Answer](https://hl7.org/fhir/R4/formats.html#table)![](data:image/png;base64,): Questionnaire:[LTCQuestionnaireSpecialCare](Questionnaire-ltc-questionnaire-special-care.md)
* [LinkID](https://hl7.org/fhir/R4/formats.html#table): ![](icon-q-string.png)G1
  * [Text](https://hl7.org/fhir/R4/formats.html#table): 疼痛狀況
  * [Definition](https://hl7.org/fhir/R4/formats.html#table): 
  * [Answer](https://hl7.org/fhir/R4/formats.html#table)![](data:image/png;base64,): 個案本人回答
* [LinkID](https://hl7.org/fhir/R4/formats.html#table): ![](icon-q-string.png)G1a
  * [Text](https://hl7.org/fhir/R4/formats.html#table): 過去 1 個月中，個案身體疼痛的程度？
  * [Definition](https://hl7.org/fhir/R4/formats.html#table): 
  * [Answer](https://hl7.org/fhir/R4/formats.html#table)![](data:image/png;base64,): 輕微的疼痛
* [LinkID](https://hl7.org/fhir/R4/formats.html#table): ![](icon-q-string.png)G2a
  * [Text](https://hl7.org/fhir/R4/formats.html#table): 請問個案現在的皮膚狀況？
  * [Definition](https://hl7.org/fhir/R4/formats.html#table): 
  * [Answer](https://hl7.org/fhir/R4/formats.html#table)![](data:image/png;base64,): 正常
* [LinkID](https://hl7.org/fhir/R4/formats.html#table): ![](icon-q-string.png)G2c
  * [Text](https://hl7.org/fhir/R4/formats.html#table): 請問皮膚異常的狀況為何？
  * [Definition](https://hl7.org/fhir/R4/formats.html#table): 
  * [Answer](https://hl7.org/fhir/R4/formats.html#table)![](data:image/png;base64,): 乾燥有皮屑
* [LinkID](https://hl7.org/fhir/R4/formats.html#table): ![](icon-q-string.png)G3a
  * [Text](https://hl7.org/fhir/R4/formats.html#table): 請問個案是否會因關節僵硬受限制，以致影響日常生活功能或造成照顧困難？
  * [Definition](https://hl7.org/fhir/R4/formats.html#table): 
  * [Answer](https://hl7.org/fhir/R4/formats.html#table)![](data:image/png;base64,): 否，沒有影響日常生活功能
* [LinkID](https://hl7.org/fhir/R4/formats.html#table): ![](icon-q-string.png)G4a
  * [Text](https://hl7.org/fhir/R4/formats.html#table): 個案過去 3 個月體重是否減輕？
  * [Definition](https://hl7.org/fhir/R4/formats.html#table): 
  * [Answer](https://hl7.org/fhir/R4/formats.html#table)![](data:image/png;base64,): 體重無變化
* [LinkID](https://hl7.org/fhir/R4/formats.html#table): ![](icon-q-string.png)G4b
  * [Text](https://hl7.org/fhir/R4/formats.html#table): 個案身體質量指數（BMI）
  * [Definition](https://hl7.org/fhir/R4/formats.html#table): 
  * [Answer](https://hl7.org/fhir/R4/formats.html#table)![](data:image/png;base64,): 22.5
* [LinkID](https://hl7.org/fhir/R4/formats.html#table): ![](icon-q-string.png)G4c
  * [Text](https://hl7.org/fhir/R4/formats.html#table): 個案一般的飲食狀況，以週為單位
  * [Definition](https://hl7.org/fhir/R4/formats.html#table): 
  * [Answer](https://hl7.org/fhir/R4/formats.html#table)![](data:image/png;base64,): 每餐吃完，從不拒絕用餐，或不需任何補充食物，或灌食自製管灌飲食大於 2400c.c./日，或採用管灌飲食（或靜脈營養）大於 1200 大卡/日
* [LinkID](https://hl7.org/fhir/R4/formats.html#table): ![](icon-q-string.png)G4d1
  * [Text](https://hl7.org/fhir/R4/formats.html#table): 過去一年中體重減少了 5% 以上？
  * [Definition](https://hl7.org/fhir/R4/formats.html#table): 
  * [Answer](https://hl7.org/fhir/R4/formats.html#table)![](data:image/png;base64,): 否
* [LinkID](https://hl7.org/fhir/R4/formats.html#table): ![](icon-q-string.png)G4d2
  * [Text](https://hl7.org/fhir/R4/formats.html#table): 可以在不用手支撐的狀況下，從椅子上站起來 5 次？
  * [Definition](https://hl7.org/fhir/R4/formats.html#table): 
  * [Answer](https://hl7.org/fhir/R4/formats.html#table)![](data:image/png;base64,): 是
* [LinkID](https://hl7.org/fhir/R4/formats.html#table): ![](icon-q-string.png)G4d3
  * [Text](https://hl7.org/fhir/R4/formats.html#table): 經常有提不起勁來做事的感覺？
  * [Definition](https://hl7.org/fhir/R4/formats.html#table): 
  * [Answer](https://hl7.org/fhir/R4/formats.html#table)![](data:image/png;base64,): 否
* [LinkID](https://hl7.org/fhir/R4/formats.html#table): ![](icon-q-string.png)G4f
  * [Text](https://hl7.org/fhir/R4/formats.html#table): 個案尋求必要醫療時，是否需要服務介入協助？
  * [Definition](https://hl7.org/fhir/R4/formats.html#table): 
  * [Answer](https://hl7.org/fhir/R4/formats.html#table)![](data:image/png;base64,): 不需要協助
* [LinkID](https://hl7.org/fhir/R4/formats.html#table): ![](icon-q-string.png)G5a
  * [Text](https://hl7.org/fhir/R4/formats.html#table): 個案目前是否接受進階照顧？
  * [Definition](https://hl7.org/fhir/R4/formats.html#table): 
  * [Answer](https://hl7.org/fhir/R4/formats.html#table)![](data:image/png;base64,): 無
* [LinkID](https://hl7.org/fhir/R4/formats.html#table): ![](icon-q-string.png)G7
  * [Text](https://hl7.org/fhir/R4/formats.html#table): 個案被診斷為失智症後，照顧者是否有接受護理人員或其他專業人員提供下列的教導？
  * [Definition](https://hl7.org/fhir/R4/formats.html#table): 
  * [Answer](https://hl7.org/fhir/R4/formats.html#table)![](data:image/png;base64,): 未接受過教導
* [LinkID](https://hl7.org/fhir/R4/formats.html#table): ![](icon-q-string.png)G8a
  * [Text](https://hl7.org/fhir/R4/formats.html#table): 請問個案是否能維持坐姿的平衡？（在沒有靠背支撐的狀況下）
  * [Definition](https://hl7.org/fhir/R4/formats.html#table): 
  * [Answer](https://hl7.org/fhir/R4/formats.html#table)![](data:image/png;base64,): 正常，不靠扶持能坐著達一分鐘以上
* [LinkID](https://hl7.org/fhir/R4/formats.html#table): ![](icon-q-string.png)G8b
  * [Text](https://hl7.org/fhir/R4/formats.html#table): 請問個案是否能維持站立的平衡？
  * [Definition](https://hl7.org/fhir/R4/formats.html#table): 
  * [Answer](https://hl7.org/fhir/R4/formats.html#table)![](data:image/png;base64,): 正常，不靠扶持能站立達一分鐘以上
* [LinkID](https://hl7.org/fhir/R4/formats.html#table): ![](icon-q-string.png)G8c
  * [Text](https://hl7.org/fhir/R4/formats.html#table): 在過去 12 個月中，個案有沒有跌倒或摔倒過？
  * [Definition](https://hl7.org/fhir/R4/formats.html#table): 
  * [Answer](https://hl7.org/fhir/R4/formats.html#table)![](data:image/png;base64,): 沒有跌倒或摔倒過【跳答 G8d】
* [LinkID](https://hl7.org/fhir/R4/formats.html#table): ![](icon-q-string.png)G8d
  * [Text](https://hl7.org/fhir/R4/formats.html#table): 你的日常活動是否因擔心跌倒而不做？
  * [Definition](https://hl7.org/fhir/R4/formats.html#table): 
  * [Answer](https://hl7.org/fhir/R4/formats.html#table)![](data:image/png;base64,): 不會擔心
* [LinkID](https://hl7.org/fhir/R4/formats.html#table): ![](icon-q-string.png)G8e
  * [Text](https://hl7.org/fhir/R4/formats.html#table): 個案對於危險的認知？
  * [Definition](https://hl7.org/fhir/R4/formats.html#table): 
  * [Answer](https://hl7.org/fhir/R4/formats.html#table)![](data:image/png;base64,): 有能力：可以認識日常生活危險來源
* [LinkID](https://hl7.org/fhir/R4/formats.html#table): ![](data:image/png;base64,) Documentation for this format



## Resource Content

```json
{
  "resourceType" : "QuestionnaireResponse",
  "id" : "ltc-questionnaire-response-special-care-example",
  "meta" : {
    "profile" : ["http://ltc-ig.fhir.tw/StructureDefinition/LTCQuestionnaireResponseCMSSpecialCare"]
  },
  "questionnaire" : "http://ltc-ig.fhir.tw/Questionnaire/ltc-questionnaire-special-care",
  "status" : "completed",
  "subject" : {
    "reference" : "Patient/ltc-patient-cms-chen-ming-hui-example"
  },
  "authored" : "2024-09-15T10:45:00+08:00",
  "item" : [{
    "linkId" : "G1",
    "text" : "疼痛狀況",
    "answer" : [{
      "valueString" : "個案本人回答"
    }]
  },
  {
    "linkId" : "G1a",
    "text" : "過去 1 個月中，個案身體疼痛的程度？",
    "answer" : [{
      "valueString" : "輕微的疼痛"
    }]
  },
  {
    "linkId" : "G2a",
    "text" : "請問個案現在的皮膚狀況？",
    "answer" : [{
      "valueString" : "正常"
    }]
  },
  {
    "linkId" : "G2c",
    "text" : "請問皮膚異常的狀況為何？",
    "answer" : [{
      "valueString" : "乾燥有皮屑"
    }]
  },
  {
    "linkId" : "G3a",
    "text" : "請問個案是否會因關節僵硬受限制，以致影響日常生活功能或造成照顧困難？",
    "answer" : [{
      "valueString" : "否，沒有影響日常生活功能"
    }]
  },
  {
    "linkId" : "G4a",
    "text" : "個案過去 3 個月體重是否減輕？",
    "answer" : [{
      "valueString" : "體重無變化"
    }]
  },
  {
    "linkId" : "G4b",
    "text" : "個案身體質量指數（BMI）",
    "answer" : [{
      "valueString" : "22.5"
    }]
  },
  {
    "linkId" : "G4c",
    "text" : "個案一般的飲食狀況，以週為單位",
    "answer" : [{
      "valueString" : "每餐吃完，從不拒絕用餐，或不需任何補充食物，或灌食自製管灌飲食大於 2400c.c./日，或採用管灌飲食（或靜脈營養）大於 1200 大卡/日"
    }]
  },
  {
    "linkId" : "G4d1",
    "text" : "過去一年中體重減少了 5% 以上？",
    "answer" : [{
      "valueString" : "否"
    }]
  },
  {
    "linkId" : "G4d2",
    "text" : "可以在不用手支撐的狀況下，從椅子上站起來 5 次？",
    "answer" : [{
      "valueString" : "是"
    }]
  },
  {
    "linkId" : "G4d3",
    "text" : "經常有提不起勁來做事的感覺？",
    "answer" : [{
      "valueString" : "否"
    }]
  },
  {
    "linkId" : "G4f",
    "text" : "個案尋求必要醫療時，是否需要服務介入協助？",
    "answer" : [{
      "valueString" : "不需要協助"
    }]
  },
  {
    "linkId" : "G5a",
    "text" : "個案目前是否接受進階照顧？",
    "answer" : [{
      "valueString" : "無"
    }]
  },
  {
    "linkId" : "G7",
    "text" : "個案被診斷為失智症後，照顧者是否有接受護理人員或其他專業人員提供下列的教導？",
    "answer" : [{
      "valueString" : "未接受過教導"
    }]
  },
  {
    "linkId" : "G8a",
    "text" : "請問個案是否能維持坐姿的平衡？（在沒有靠背支撐的狀況下）",
    "answer" : [{
      "valueString" : "正常，不靠扶持能坐著達一分鐘以上"
    }]
  },
  {
    "linkId" : "G8b",
    "text" : "請問個案是否能維持站立的平衡？",
    "answer" : [{
      "valueString" : "正常，不靠扶持能站立達一分鐘以上"
    }]
  },
  {
    "linkId" : "G8c",
    "text" : "在過去 12 個月中，個案有沒有跌倒或摔倒過？",
    "answer" : [{
      "valueString" : "沒有跌倒或摔倒過【跳答 G8d】"
    }]
  },
  {
    "linkId" : "G8d",
    "text" : "你的日常活動是否因擔心跌倒而不做？",
    "answer" : [{
      "valueString" : "不會擔心"
    }]
  },
  {
    "linkId" : "G8e",
    "text" : "個案對於危險的認知？",
    "answer" : [{
      "valueString" : "有能力：可以認識日常生活危險來源"
    }]
  }]
}

```
